title: eremurus stenophyllus subsp. aurantiacus
intro: Eremurus stenophyllus subsp. aurantiacus, also known as the yellow foxtail, is a plant species in the Asphodelaceae family, characterized by its bright yellow flowers and slender stem. Traditionally, this plant has been used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which are attributed to the presence of saponins and other compounds. The health benefits of Eremurus stenophyllus subsp. aurantiacus include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate digestive issues, and provide relief from respiratory problems. Herbal preparations of this plant are typically made by infusing the roots or flowers in water or oil, and can be used in the form of teas, tinctures, or topical applications.
